chapter_title.ar: بَابُ طِينَةِ الْمُؤْمِنِ وَ الْكَافِرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 1 – The clay of the Momin (Believer) and the disbeliever (Kafir)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/ 7)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/ 7)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ مِنْ أَيِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ طِينَةَ الْمُؤْمِنِ فَقَالَ مِنْ طِينَةِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ فَلَمْ تَنْجَسْ أَبَداً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Mahboub, from Salih Bin Sahl who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! From which thing did Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Create the clay of the Believer?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘From the clay of the Prophets<sup>as</sup>, so they would never be unclean, ever!’
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn Mahbub from Salih ibn Sahl who has said that I asked abu abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) the following: “May Allah keep my soul of service to you, from what kind of material has Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, created the clay of the believers? He then replied, ‘He has created them with the clay from which the prophets were made. Thus, they never become unclean.’”
